name: PublishKbArticle
description: Publish or update a knowledge base article in ServiceNow
author: sethbacon

inputs.name: serviceConnection
inputs.label: ServiceNow Service Connection
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional. A service connection for the ServiceNow instance. If not set, provide instance and credentials inline.

inputs.name: instance
inputs.label: ServiceNow Instance
inputs.helpMarkDown: ServiceNow instance name (e.g. 'mycompany'). Required when no service connection is provided.

inputs.name: authType
inputs.label: Authentication Type
inputs.helpMarkDown: Authentication method to use when no service connection is provided.

inputs.name: clientId
inputs.label: OAuth Client ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: OAuth client application ID.

inputs.name: clientSecret
inputs.label: OAuth Client Secret
inputs.helpMarkDown: OAuth client application secret.

inputs.name: username
inputs.label: Username
inputs.helpMarkDown: ServiceNow username for basic authentication.

inputs.name: password
inputs.label: Password
inputs.helpMarkDown: ServiceNow password for basic authentication.

inputs.name: kbId
inputs.label: Knowledge Base ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Knowledge base sys_id. Use 'list' to print available knowledge bases.

inputs.name: articleId
inputs.label: Article ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Existing article sys_id to update. If not provided, the task auto-detects via source key or JSON file.

inputs.name: title
inputs.label: Article Title
inputs.helpMarkDown: Article title (short_description). Required when creating a new article.

inputs.name: htmlFile
inputs.label: HTML File
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to an HTML file whose contents become the article body.

inputs.name: author
inputs.label: Author
inputs.helpMarkDown: ServiceNow username of the article author. Required when creating a new article.

inputs.name: category
inputs.label: Category
inputs.helpMarkDown: Category name. Prefix with 'sys_id:' to provide a raw sys_id. Auto-created if not found.

inputs.name: subcategory
inputs.label: Subcategory
inputs.helpMarkDown: Subcategory name (requires Category to be set). Auto-created under the parent category if not found.

inputs.name: workflowState
inputs.label: Workflow State
inputs.helpMarkDown: Target workflow state for the article.

inputs.name: sourceKey
inputs.label: Source Key
inputs.helpMarkDown: Stable correlation key for idempotent create/update (e.g. 'aws-connect-to-servers'). Stored as 'wiki-source: <key>' in meta_description.

inputs.name: readKeyFrom
inputs.label: Read Key From File
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to a Markdown file whose 'kb-key:' YAML front-matter field is used as the source key.

inputs.name: emitManifest
inputs.label: Emit Manifest Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to a JSON manifest file to append article metadata. When set, no KB*.json file is written.

inputs.name: force
inputs.label: Force
inputs.helpMarkDown: Continue processing even if HTML validation fails.

inputs.name: skipJsonLookup
inputs.label: Skip JSON Lookup
inputs.helpMarkDown: Skip looking for KB article JSON files in the current directory.

inputs.name: dryRun
inputs.label: Dry run
inputs.helpMarkDown: Preview the publish without writing to ServiceNow. Converts and validates content, performs read-only lookups (source key, existing article), and logs the planned create/update action and target — but performs no POST/PATCH, no category creation, and writes no manifest. Useful for PR builds.

inputs.name: uploadImages
inputs.label: Upload images as attachments
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled, relative images in the article body are uploaded as ServiceNow attachments on the article, and their src is rewritten to a sys_attachment.do?sys_id=... URL. Re-publishing reuses unchanged images and replaces changed ones (matched by file name).

inputs.name: imageBaseDir
inputs.label: Image base directory
inputs.helpMarkDown: Directory that relative image paths in the HTML are resolved against (e.g. the module repo root). Defaults to the directory of the HTML file.

outputVariables.name: kbArticleId
outputVariables.description: The sys_id of the created or updated KB article.

outputVariables.name: kbArticleNumber
outputVariables.description: The article number (e.g. KB0001234) of the created or updated article.

outputVariables.name: kbWorkflowState
outputVariables.description: The workflow state of the article after this task runs.
